de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml

Class JmlIO

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.JmlIO

  • public class JmlIO
extends java.lang.Object
    Stateful service for translating JML into KeY entities.

    This facade stores a the parsing context of JML constructs, e.g., the return or self variable, the parameters. You can set these values via the builder methods. The translate* methods translate a given ParserRuleContext into a KeY-entity.

    It also maintains the list of translation warnings, see getWarnings().

    Internally, this is a type-safe wrapper around the visitor Translator.

    See Also:
    Translator

      Parses and interpret the given input as an JML expression in the current context.

      Parses a JML constructs which occurs inside methods (mostly JML statements) and returns a parse tree.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • JmlIO

        public JmlIO()
        Generate an empty jml i/o instance. No very useful until a services(Services) is provided.

      • JmlIO

        public JmlIO(@Nonnull
             Services services,
             @Nullable
             KeYJavaType specInClass,
             @Nullable
             ProgramVariable selfVar,
             @Nullable
             ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars,
             @Nullable
             ProgramVariable resultVar,
             @Nullable
             ProgramVariable excVar,
             @Nullable
             java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres,
             @Nullable
             java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atBefores)
        Full constructor of this class. Prefer the use via builder methods.
        Parameters:
        services - a service object used for constructing the terms
        specInClass - the class in which the expression and contracts should be evaluated
        selfVar - the self variable considered for this-references
        paramVars - a list of parameter variables
        resultVar - the \return-variable
        excVar - the variable to store exception
        atPres - i do not know
        atBefores - i do not know

    • Method Detail

      • translateRepresents

        public Pair<IObserverFunction,Term> translateRepresents(org.antlr.v4.runtime.ParserRuleContext clause)
        Interpret the given parse tree as a represents clause
        Throws:
        java.lang.ClassCastException - if unsuitable parser rule context is given

      • translateRepresents

        @Nonnull
public Pair<IObserverFunction,Term> translateRepresents(@Nonnull
                                                                 LabeledParserRuleContext clause)
        Interpret a given represents clause.

        Note weigl: This method does not add the given term label to the returned objects. I am not if this is currently wanted/needed.

        Throws:
        java.lang.ClassCastException - if unsuitable parser rule context is given@param clause

      • isKnownFunction

        public static boolean isKnownFunction(java.lang.String functionName)
        Checks whether the given functionName is a known JML function for KeY.
        Parameters:
        functionName - a string
        Returns:
        true if the function is known
        See Also:
        JmlTermFactory.jml2jdl

                                               OriginTermLabel.SpecType type)
        Interpret a labeled term (breaks clauses, continue clauses).

      • parseExpression

        public Term parseExpression(PositionedString p)
        Parse and interpret the given string as an JML expression in the current context.

      • translateTerm

        @Nonnull
public Term translateTerm(@Nonnull
                                   org.antlr.v4.runtime.ParserRuleContext expr)
        Interpret the given parse tree as an JML expression in the current context.

      • translateTerm

        public Term translateTerm(LabeledParserRuleContext expr)
        Interpret the given parse tree as an JML expression in the current context. Label is attached.

      • translateTerm

        public Term translateTerm(LabeledParserRuleContext expr,
                          OriginTermLabel.SpecType type)
        Interpret the given parse tree as an JML expression in the current context. Attach both given labels type and in labeled parse tree.

      • translateTerm

        public Term translateTerm(org.antlr.v4.runtime.ParserRuleContext expr,
                          OriginTermLabel.SpecType type)
        Interpret the given parse tree as an JML expression in the current context. Given label is attached.

      • parseExpression

        public Term parseExpression(java.lang.String input)
        Parses and interpret the given input as an JML expression in the current context.

      • translateInfFlow

        @Nonnull
public InfFlowSpec translateInfFlow(@Nonnull
                                             org.antlr.v4.runtime.ParserRuleContext expr)
        Translate the given context into an information flow specification.
        Parameters:
        expr - should be a JmlParser.Separates_clauseContext or JmlParser.Determines_clauseContext, or JmlParser.Loop_separates_clauseContext or JmlParser.Loop_determines_clauseContext.
        Returns:
        a information flow specification from the given context.
        Throws:
        java.lang.ClassCastException - if the expr is not suitable

      • translateInfFlow

        public InfFlowSpec translateInfFlow(LabeledParserRuleContext expr)
        Translate the given context into an information flow specification. Like translateInfFlow(ParserRuleContext) but this method can also handles the given label.

      • translateDependencyContract

        public Triple<IObserverFunction,Term,Term> translateDependencyContract(org.antlr.v4.runtime.ParserRuleContext ctx)
        Translates the given context into a dependency contract, aka, accessible-clause or depends-clause.
        Parameters:
        ctx - should a JmlParser.Accessible_clauseContext
        Returns:
        a dependency contract
        Throws:
        java.lang.ClassCastException - if the ctx is not suitable

      • translateDependencyContract

        public Triple<IObserverFunction,Term,Term> translateDependencyContract(LabeledParserRuleContext ctx)
        Translates a dependency contract.

        Note (weigl): No label is currently attached.

        Throws:
        java.lang.ClassCastException - if the ctx is not suitable
